commitments.text: acelerar esfuerzos, en coordinación con el sector privado y las ciudades del país, para la movilidad eléctrica
consolidación de una Estrategia Nacional de Movilidad Eléctrica
mejora en la vinculación de la planeación urbana con criterios de cambio climático y de recuperación del espacio público para el peatón
ordenamiento orientado a sistemas de transporte público eficiente y a sistemas de transporte alternativos y no motorizados
disminuir la emisión de gases y compuestos de efecto invernadero, a través del Programa de Desarrollo del Sistema Eléctrico Nacional y el Plan de Negocios de CFE

measurability.reason: None of the commitments have specific numbers, units, target years, or baselines.

gap_findings.description: Mexico's NDC lacks a specific commitment to reduce transport sector emissions.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 Ch10: transport emissions must fall 59–84% by 2050 vs 2020 in 1.5°C scenarios.

gap_findings.description: Mexico's NDC commitments are vague and lack quantification.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: acelerar esfuerzos, en coordinación con el sector privado y las ciudades del país, para la movilidad eléctrica
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 Ch10: transport emissions must fall 59–84% by 2050 vs 2020 in 1.5°C scenarios.

gap_findings.description: Mexico's NDC does not mention EV share targets, which are recommended by IPCC AR6.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 Ch10: EV share 75–95% of new sales by 2050.

gap_findings.description: Mexico's NDC does not mention conditional dependency on international finance.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 Ch10: transport emissions must fall 59–84% by 2050 vs 2020 in 1.5°C scenarios.

details.summary: Mexico's NDC lacks specific commitments to reduce transport sector emissions and lacks quantification. However, it does not contradict IPCC recommendations.

pass_c.country_summary: Mexico's NDC lacks specific commitments to reduce transport sector emissions and lacks quantification. However, it does not contradict IPCC recommendations.
pass_c.policy_recommendation: Mexico should strengthen its NDC commitments to include specific targets for reducing transport sector emissions and increasing EV share.
